<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./ceys.css">
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Document</title>
</head>
<body>
<div class="o">
<nav>DE EN</nav>
<h1>Exclusive</h1>
<h1>Innovation</h1>
<h1>Design</h1>
<h1>Sustainability</h1>
<h1>Art & Culture</h1>
<h1>Vehicles</h1>
<nav>search</nav>
</div>  

<div class="k">
<img width="2000px" height="1000px" src="https://www.mercedes-benz.com/assets/vehicles/c-class/stage/04-2026/mercedes-benz-c-class-exterior-master16x9.jpg" alt="">
</div>

<div class="m">
<marquee  direction="right"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></marquee>
<h1 style="color: brown;">Follow
Mercedes-Benz</h1>
</div>
</body>
</html>
